note: Triaged suppressions for the flow-audit go-live gate. Only confirmed false-positives and intentional patterns are listed. Real findings (duplicate auth guards, duplicate cursor decoder) are deliberately NOT suppressed - they remain gate-failing until consolidated.

suppressions.reason: Intentional. BuddyNextPro\Payments\Gateways\Test\TestGateway::cancel_subscription and ::refund are identical no-op stubs in the Test payment gateway (developer sandbox gateway); they are deliberately trivial, not a real duplicate to consolidate.
False positive. bnToast is the global JS notification helper (window.bnToast), not a key of the /spaces response. The best-effort obj.prop matcher caught a global call within the route URL window.
False positive. bnSpaces is the localized global config object (window.bnSpaces) emitted via wp_localize_script, not a key of the /spaces response.
